articles.title: Low-Vision Programmers Can Now Design 3D Models Independently
articles.summary: Most 3D design software requires visual dragging and rotating—posing a challenge for blind and low-vision users. articles.title: New Devices Might Scale the Memory Wall
articles.summary: The hunt is on for anything that can surmount AI’s perennial memory wall–even quick models are bogged down by the time and energy needed to carry data between processor and memory.
